case_title: UCHIDA MEGUMI D.C. VS PENDERGAST MARGARET

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENDERGAST MARGARET
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UCHIDA MEGUMI D.C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PENDERGAST MARGARET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $569.32 FILED BY UCHIDA MEGUMI D.C. AS TO DEFENDANT PENDERGAST MARGARET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
CERT. RECEIPT TO MARGARET PENDERGAST RETURNED SIGNED.
